summary: Comprehensive test of LiveWatch Supabase integration. Backend pytest: 17/17 passing (8 NovaStream + 9 new Supabase/extras). Frontend: Home, FavoritesProvider counter sync, favorites filter, Multiview 2x2/3x3/4x4 + picker + iframe embed all working. CRITICAL BUG: /dashboard infinite spinner after fresh signup — page never resolves to profile-card even after 25s, meaning AuthContext loading stays true OR Supabase user_profiles fetch hangs. Also React hydration warning: <FavoriteButton> button is nested inside <ChannelCard> button (invalid HTML).

minor.issue: Occasional 502 / upstream resolution failures (~5-10%) due to vavoo/kool upstream variability. Retry-once strategy passes.

Some upstream playlists return non-#EXTM3U content (e.g. 'Unavailable 3') and the proxy rewrites it as a single /api/hls?u=... line — proxy passes a 200 but body is degraded. Consider returning 502 if the upstream playlist is missing #EXTM3U.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration error: '<button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. ChannelCard renders as <button> and contains <FavoriteButton> which is also a <button>. Convert ChannelCard outer element to <div role='button' tabIndex={0}> or move FavoriteButton outside the card button.

Infinite loading spinner after a fresh signup → /dashboard. Profile-card never appears (waited 25s). Console shows no fetch error. Likely root cause: AuthContext.fetchProfile uses supabase.from('user_profiles').select(...).eq('id', userId).single() — if the user_profiles row was NOT auto-created for new signups (missing DB trigger handle_new_user) AND/OR if Supabase RLS blocks the SELECT, the call may resolve with PGRST116 and setLoading(false) should run — but the UI clearly stays in the `if (loading) <Loader2 />` branch. Need to: (1) ensure a user_profiles row is inserted on auth.users insert (trigger), (2) add a timeout/fallback in AuthProvider so loading flips to false even if fetchProfile rejects/hangs.

integration_issues.issue: User signs up successfully (URL transitions /login → /dashboard) but Dashboard never renders profile content. Blocks all dashboard features (favorites display, VIP redemption, profile card).

Not testable because Dashboard infinite-loader prevented confirming the same loading-state issue isn't also blocking /admin. Manual code review of Admin.jsx (lines 174+) shows it uses the same useAuth() loading flag — so it would have the same problem.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Dashboard infinite spinner. Add a safety timeout in AuthProvider so setLoading(false) runs even if fetchProfile hangs/throws. Inspect Supabase project to ensure user_profiles row is auto-created via DB trigger on auth.users insert; if not, create the row from the frontend after a successful signUp.

HIGH: Fix <button>-inside-<button> nesting (ChannelCard wraps FavoriteButton). Use <div role='button' tabIndex={0} onKeyDown> for the card or stop event-bubbling and move FavoriteButton as a sibling positioned absolutely.
MEDIUM: When /api/hls upstream is degraded (no #EXTM3U), return 502 instead of an empty rewritten line.
LOW: Add a retry hint toast for /api/stream/{id} 502s in the player UI.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.jsx: No timeout/error path that flips `loading` to false; a failing/hanging fetchProfile pegs the entire app in a spinner. Wrap the IIFE in a 5s safety race (Promise.race).
Dashboard.jsx / Admin.jsx both early-return on `if (loading)` — they should also handle a rejected profile fetch (show a retry button instead of spinning forever).
ChannelCard.jsx uses <button> as root + nested <FavoriteButton> — invalid HTML (logged twice in console). Will break a11y and may regress in React 19 strict.
AuthContext.fetchProfile uses .single() which throws when zero rows — handled, but consider .maybeSingle() to be explicit.
server.py /api/admin/vip-keys/generate: catches schema mismatch by retrying without `created_by` — leaves orphan inserts on partial failure. Prefer a single explicit schema.
test_credentials: Disposable signup pattern qa+{timestamp}@livewatchtest.dev / Test1234! (created qa+1779145151@livewatchtest.dev and qa+1779145202@livewatchtest.dev during this run; can be cleaned up via Supabase admin).
seed_data_creation: Two disposable Supabase auth users created via signup. No backend MongoDB seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid. Two new pytest files cover the Supabase/extra endpoints and a 10-way concurrent /api/hls single-flight check (all passing). FRONT-END BLOCKING ISSUE: Dashboard hangs on Loader2 after signup. To repro: open /dashboard in a fresh browser → redirected to /login → signup with qa+{ts}@livewatchtest.dev / Test1234! → after signup it navigates to /dashboard but profile-card never appears. Also two console hydration warnings about button-nested-in-button from ChannelCard+FavoriteButton. Once main agent fixes both, re-run: home favorites sync (PASSES today), /multiview embed (PASSES), /dashboard render with role=Membre, /admin denial message for non-admin, VIP key redemption form visibility.
rca of the issue: Dashboard infinite-spinner RCA — Dashboard.jsx line 68: `if (loading) return <Loader2/>`. `loading` comes from AuthContext which only flips false inside the initial-mount IIFE after `await supabase.auth.getSession()` then `await fetchProfile()` complete. If the user_profiles row does not exist (no DB trigger creating it on signup) AND the Supabase JS .single() call rejects with PGRST116, the catch sets profile=null but setLoading(false) IS reached. However observed behaviour shows loading stuck → most likely RLS on user_profiles is blocking the SELECT for the user and the call is hanging (Supabase JS retries on network error). Mitigation: (a) add Promise.race timeout in AuthProvider, (b) create handle_new_user() trigger in Supabase to insert a default user_profiles row, (c) switch .single() to .maybeSingle(), (d) guarantee permissive SELECT-own-row RLS policy.
